# statusgator_service_monitor (Resource)

Manages a StatusGator service monitor that tracks an external status page.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Monitor an external service's status page
resource "statusgator_service_monitor" "aws" {
  board_id   = "my-board-id"
  service_id = "amazon-web-services"
  name       = "AWS"
}

# Service monitor in a group
resource "statusgator_service_monitor" "github" {
  board_id   = "my-board-id"
  service_id = "github"
  name       = "GitHub"
  group_id   = statusgator_monitor_group.third_party.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `board_id` (String) The ID of the board this monitor belongs to.
- `service_id` (String) The ID of the external service to monitor.

### Optional

- `group_id` (String) The ID of the monitor group this monitor belongs to.
- `name` (String) Custom display name for the monitor. If not set, the service name will be used.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the monitor.
- `service_name` (String) The name of the external service.
- `status` (String) Current status of the monitor (up, down, warn, unknown).
